languages.text: "Я верю вам, Лорд-капитан. Вы не допустите. Не отдадите своих людей железу. Я верю". {n}Искаженное судорогами лицо мужчины расслабляется, оружие выскальзывает из рук и падает на пол.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Я верю вам, Лорд-капитан. Вы не допустите. Не отдадите своих людей железу. Я верю". {n}Искаженное судорогами лицо мужчины раслабляется, оружие выскальзывает из рук и падает на пол.{/n}

languages.text: "I believe you, Lord Captain. You wouldn't allow it. You wouldn't hand your men over to the metal. I believe you." {n}The man's seizure-twisted face relaxes and the weapon slips from his grasp and falls to the floor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я верю вам, Лорд-капитан. Вы не допустите. Не отдадите своих людей железу. Я верю". {n}Искаженное судорогами лицо мужчины расслабляется, оружие выскальзывает из рук и падает на пол.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I believe you, Lord Captain. You will not allow it. You will not hand your men over to the metal. I believe you." {n}The man's seizure-twisted face relaxes, the weapon slips from his grasp and falls to the floor.{/n}

"I believe you, Lord Captain. You wouldn't allow it. You wouldn't hand your men over to the metal. I believe you." {n}The man's seizure-twisted face relaxes and the weapon slips from his grasp and falls to the floor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich glaube Euch, Lord Captain. Das würdet Ihr nicht zulassen. Ihr würdet Eure Männer nicht dem Metall übergeben. Ich glaube Euch." {n}Das gepeinigte Gesicht des Mannes entspannt sich, als die Waffe aus seiner Hand gleitet und zu Boden fällt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Lord Captain. You wouldn't allow it. You wouldn't hand your men over to the metal. I believe you." {n}The man's seizure-twisted face relaxes and the weapon slips from his grasp and falls to the floor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich glaube Euch, Lord Captain. Das würdet Ihr nicht zulassen. Ihr würdet Eure Männer nicht dem Metall übergeben. Ich glaube Euch." {n}Das gepeinigte Gesicht des Mannes entspannt sich, als die Waffe aus seiner Hand gleitet und zu Boden fällt.{/n}

languages.text: « Je vous crois, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Jamais vous ne permettriez une telle ignominie. Jamais vous ne livreriez vos hommes au métal. Je vous crois. » {n}Le visage de l'homme, jusque-là déformé par les convulsions, se détend soudain, et l'arme lui glisse des mains pour tomber au sol.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Lord Captain. You wouldn't allow it. You wouldn't hand your men over to the metal. I believe you." {n}The man's seizure-twisted face relaxes and the weapon slips from his grasp and falls to the floor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je vous crois, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Jamais vous ne permettriez une telle ignominie. Jamais vous ne livreriez vos hommes au métal. Je vous crois. » {n}Le visage de l'homme, jusque-là déformé par les convulsions, se détend soudain, et l'arme lui glisse des mains pour tomber au sol.{/n}

languages.text: “我信您，舰长大人。您不会容许这种事的，您不会把手下的人交给那些金属。我信您。”{n}那人因痉挛而扭曲的脸放松下来，武器从他手中滑落，掉落在甲板上。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Lord Captain. You wouldn't allow it. You wouldn't hand your men over to the metal. I believe you." {n}The man's seizure-twisted face relaxes and the weapon slips from his grasp and falls to the floor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我信您，舰长大人。您不会容许这种事的，您不会把手下的人交给那些金属。我信您。”{n}那人因痉挛而扭曲的脸放松下来，武器从他手中滑落，掉落在甲板上。{/n}

languages.text: «Le creo, Lord Capitán. No lo permitirá. No entregará a sus hombres al metal. Le creo». {n}La cara del hombre, deformada por las convulsiones, se relaja y el arma que sujetaba cae al suelo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Lord Captain. You wouldn't allow it. You wouldn't hand your men over to the metal. I believe you." {n}The man's seizure-twisted face relaxes and the weapon slips from his grasp and falls to the floor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Le creo, Lord Capitán. No lo permitirá. No entregará a sus hombres al metal. Le creo». {n}La cara del hombre, deformada por las convulsiones, se relaja y el arma que sujetaba cae al suelo.{/n}

languages.text: 「ロード・キャプテン、私はあなたを信じます。あなたはそれを許さない。部下を金属に渡してはならない。信じます」{n}男の発作でゆがんだ顔が緩み、武器が彼の手から滑り落ち、床に落ちる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Lord Captain. You wouldn't allow it. You wouldn't hand your men over to the metal. I believe you." {n}The man's seizure-twisted face relaxes and the weapon slips from his grasp and falls to the floor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ロード・キャプテン、私はあなたを信じます。あなたはそれを許さない。部下を金属に渡してはならない。信じます」{n}男の発作でゆがんだ顔が緩み、武器が彼の手から滑り落ち、床に落ちる。{/n}

languages.text: "Size inanıyorum Lord Kaptan. Buna izin vermezdiniz. Adamlarınızı metale teslim etmezdiniz. Size inanıyorum." {n}Adamın nöbetle çarpılmış yüzü gevşiyor, silah elinden kayıp yere düşüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Lord Captain. You wouldn't allow it. You wouldn't hand your men over to the metal. I believe you." {n}The man's seizure-twisted face relaxes and the weapon slips from his grasp and falls to the floor.{/n}
